title: Forgotten Blocks - Andesite, Calcite, Tuff and More!
description: Expanding Andesite, Calcite, Tuff and more with Bricks, Tiles, Pillars and more. The Perfect 'Vanilla+' expansion for builders.
body:
# Forgotten Blocks!

This Mod aims to fix Minecrafts long running lack of finished blocksets. Every Blockset that is updated will recieve Bricks, Pillars, Mossy Variants, Pillars, Stairs, Slabs, Walls and more!

Currently expands upon the following Blocksets:
- Andesite
- Diorite
- Granite
- Calcite
- Dripstone
- Tuff
- Stone
- Smooth Stone
- Mud
- Packed Mud
- Purpur
- Prismarine
- Dark Prismarine

This Mod is still actively receiving Updates!

## **Andesite, Diorite and Granite Showcase!**
![Andesite, Diorite and Granite Showcase!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6b7f1f5f5e53e38f11839db967981a37df69097_0.webp)
More to be seen in the Gallery!

Join the Discord to report any Bugs or to keep up to Date!
